title: TomExpensive
description: TomExpensive is a lightweight, high-performance solution for Minecraft 1.21.1+ that removes the restrictive "Too Expensive!" limit in Anvils. It ensures your players can always repair and enchant their gear while providing modern utility features.
body:
# TomExpensive

TomExpensive removes the vanilla "Too Expensive!" anvil limit while keeping the real XP cost visible and charged in Survival mode.

## Features

- Shows true anvil costs above 40 levels in Survival, such as 120 levels.
- Keeps expensive anvil results clickable through ProtocolLib.
- Supports colored anvil renames with MiniMessage, legacy `&` colors, and hex colors.
- Allows free anvil use with the `tomexpensive.free` permission.
- Includes `/repair` for repairing the item in your hand.
- Checks Modrinth for newer versions without warning for older releases.

## Rename Colors

Use any of these formats in the anvil rename field:

- `&cRed Sword`
- `&#ff5555Hex Sword`
- `#55ffffCrystal Blade`
- `<gradient:red:gold>Dragon Axe</gradient>`

## Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| `/repair` | Repairs the item in your main hand. | `tomexpensive.repair` |

## Permissions

- `tomexpensive.repair`: Allows using `/repair`. Default: OP.
- `tomexpensive.free`: Makes anvil use cost 0 levels. Default: false.

## Requirements

- Paper 1.21.1+
- ProtocolLib 5.3.0+
- Java 21+

## Installation

1. Download the latest TomExpensive jar.
2. Install ProtocolLib on your server.
3. Drop TomExpensive into your server's `plugins` folder.
4. Restart the server.

![bStats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/TomExpensive.svg)
